name_en: Model: M47123 Pochette Tirette Handbag, crafted in Monogram canvas for a relaxed silhouette, opening the Louis Vuitton 2024 Spring-Summer show with a bold attitude. Leather trim highlights the side's pointed silhouette reminiscent of the brand's zipper pull, while the dazzling lock and detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap add detail. 22 x 12 x 5.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
